summary: A brief housekeeping post where Dan Shapiro apologizes for not posting on his woodworking blog. He explains that his day job has been too busy and he just returned from a vacation in Vietnam. He promises to resume posting but warns updates may remain sporadic.
key_points: Shapiro's blog at this time was focused on woodworking, not technology
He signals that 'real life' work takes priority over his hobby blogging
This is a placeholder post with no substantive content
money_quotes: My non-woodworking real life has been too busy to spend much time in the shop.
key_insight: A brief housekeeping note from Shapiro's early woodworking blog era, notable only as a snapshot of his pre-tech-CEO blogging life.
